lines.name: The Gnashing Sash
lines.flavourText:
"Ghorr knows only hunger, only ravenous feasting.
It will consume all that lives, and more!"
- Rantings of a Templar prisoner, page fourteen

explicitModifiers.text: Life Recovery from [Flask|Flasks] can [Overflow|Overflow] Maximum Life

lines.name: Mageblood
lines.flavourText:
Rivers of power coursed through their veins.
Now, that power is yours, for good or ill.

explicitModifiers.text: All [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacies] have (25-50)% increased effect per duplicate [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] you have

lines.name: Headhunter
lines.flavourText:
"A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

explicitModifiers.text: When you kill a [Rarity|Rare] monster, you gain its [MonsterModifiers|Modifiers] for 60 seconds

lines.name: Bursting Decay
lines.flavourText:
"All Beidat desires is a foothold, a grip on your flesh,
on the world... he will offer you anything to get it..."
- Rantings of a Templar prisoner, page thirty

explicitModifiers.text: [Attack|Attacks] have added [Physical] damage equal to 3% of maximum Life

lines.name: Kalandra's Touch
lines.flavourText: Power is a matter of perspective.

lines.name: Eshtera's Path
lines.flavourText:
During the Winter of the World, her akhara began
shepherding jingakh across the harsh Vastiri. Sekhema
Eshtera planted the seeds of Maraketh diplomacy.

explicitModifiers.text: You can only Socket Sapphire Jewels in this item
+(5-10)% to [Fire] and [Cold] [Resistances] per [Equipped|Equipped Item] with a [Lightning] [Resistances|Resistance] Modifier

lines.name: Safrin's Resolve
lines.flavourText:
The Vaal protected those who integrated into their 
culture. Many neighbours became one. Sekhema Safrin 
vowed the Maraketh identity would remain resolute.

explicitModifiers.text: You can only Socket Ruby Jewels in this item
+(5-10)% to [Cold] and [Lightning] [Resistances] per [Equipped|Equipped Item] with a [Fire] [Resistances|Resistance] Modifier

lines.name: The Taming
lines.flavourText:
"Moon after moon did Berek make fools
Of the great and Untamed Three
Until malice for a Brother
Slew the hatred of the Other
And Berek did hunt
Alone and free."
- Berek and the Untamed

explicitModifiers.text: (10-20)% increased Damage for each type of [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailment] on Enemy
[Wind|Wind Skills] which can be boosted by [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surfaces] can be boosted by multiple [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surfaces]

[Wind|Wind Skills] which can be boosted by [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surfaces] count
as being boosted by [IgnitedGround|Ignited], [ShockedGround|Shocked], and [ChilledGround|Chilled] Ground

lines.name: Zaida's Longevity
lines.flavourText:
The relative peace under the fledgling Empire saw
the first Sekhema to choose, in her resplendent age and
wisdom, to step down. The role of Zaitema was born.

explicitModifiers.text: You can only Socket Emerald Jewels in this item
+(5-10)% to [Fire] and [Lightning] [Resistances] per [Equipment|Equipped Item] with a [Cold] [Resistances|Resistance] Modifier

lines.name: Waistgate
lines.flavourText: Clever artifice is not always complex.

implicitModifiers.text: (15-25)% Life Recovery from [Flask|Flasks] also applies to [Ward|Runic Ward]
[Ward|Runic Ward] recovery can can [Overflow] maximum [Ward|Runic Ward]

explicitModifiers.text: Life and Mana [Flask|Flasks] can be equipped in either slot

lines.name: Snakepit
lines.flavourText: They wrap around you until your blood turns as cold as theirs.

lines.name: Dream Fragments
lines.flavourText:
Doryani stumbled into a realm of madness
And awoke its Master.

lines.name: Berek's Grip
lines.flavourText:
"Berek hid from Storm's lightning wrath
In the embrace of oblivious Frost
Repelled by ice, blinded by blizzards
Storm raged in vain
While Berek slept."
- Berek and the Untamed

explicitModifiers.text: [HitDamage|Hits] against you have (35-50)% reduced [Critical|Critical Hit Chance] while you are [Chill|Chilled]

[Wind|Wind Skills] which can be boosted by [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surfaces] count
as being boosted by [ShockedGround|Shocked Ground]

lines.name: Berek's Pass
lines.flavourText:
"From Frost's ice-bound pass
Berek taunted and jeered
Until furious Flame scaled the mountain
Berek escaped through the thaw
And Frost's tortured moans."
- Berek and the Untamed

explicitModifiers.text: Regenerate (1-2)% of maximum Life per second while [Ignite|Ignited]

[Wind|Wind Skills] which can be boosted by [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surfaces] count
as being boosted by [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground]

lines.name: Berek's Respite
lines.flavourText:
"With Flame licking at his heels
Berek berated the clouds
Until vengeful Storm spewed forth his rains
And Berek held on tight
As Fire screamed and steamed
And fled."
- Berek and the Untamed

explicitModifiers.text:
[Wind|Wind Skills] which can be boosted by [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surfaces] count
as being boosted by [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground]

lines.name: Eventide Petals
lines.flavourText:
Dannig sculpted the Verisium to evoke the
night-blooming lotus of Middengard's stygian peaks,
which grow only where ash meets the snow and stars.

explicitModifiers.text: [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] have (1-3)% increased maximum Life per 5% [Resistances|Cold Resistance] you have
[IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] have (1-3)% reduced maximum Life per 5% [Resistances|Cold Resistance] you have

lines.name: Astramentis
lines.flavourText:
Mindless rage will shake the world,
Cunning lies will bend it.
Reckless haste will break the world,
And into darkness send it.

lines.name: Original Sin
lines.flavourText:
Innocence rose to godhood not on inspired faith,
but on the vilification and hatred of another.

lines.name: Andvarius
lines.flavourText: Danger is the price of wealth.

lines.name: Ventor's Gamble
lines.flavourText:
In a blaze of glory,
An anomaly defying all odds
The "unkillable" beast met the divine
And Ventor met his latest trophy.

lines.name: Immaculate Adherence
lines.flavourText: To stray is to condemn this world to sin.

explicitModifiers.text: 100% of Damage is taken from Mana before Life
Skills Cost [Divinity] instead of Mana or Life

lines.name: Levinstone
lines.flavourText: Highgate held other secrets.

lines.name: Yoke of Suffering
lines.flavourText: Let the unrepentant be dragged ever downwards by the weight of their sins.

explicitModifiers.text:
Enemies take (15-20)% increased Damage for each [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailment] type among
your Ailments on them
(30-40)% reduced Duration of [Ignite], [Shock] and [Chill] on Enemies

lines.itemId: Choir of the Storm Jade Amulet
lines.name: Choir of the Storm
lines.flavourText:
But the fool did not bow.
The fool stood and questioned.
And the fool was unwritten.

lines.name: Eventide Petals
lines.flavourText:
Dannig sculpted the Verisium to evoke the
night-blooming lotus of Middengard's stygian peaks,
which grow only where ash meets the snow and stars.

explicitModifiers.text: [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] have (1-3)% reduced maximum Life per 5% [Resistances|Cold Resistance] you have
[IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] have (1-3)% increased maximum Life per 5% [Resistances|Cold Resistance] you have

lines.name: Shavronne's Satchel
lines.flavourText: Bring mystery to life. Again and again.

explicitModifiers.text: Life Recovery from [Flask|Flasks] also applies to [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]

lines.name: Defiance of Destiny
lines.flavourText:
The respect of Karui warriors is hard to earn,
but lasts a lifetime... and beyond.

explicitModifiers.text: Recover (20-30)% of Missing Life before being [HitDamage|Hit] by an Enemy

lines.name: Ingenuity
lines.flavourText:
Experiments with geomancy taught
the Maji more than they ever expected.

explicitModifiers.text: (20-30)% increased bonuses gained from left Equipped Ring
(20-30)% increased bonuses gained from right Equipped Ring

lines.name: Doedre's Damning
lines.flavourText: Where her mouth should have been there was only a whirling, black void.

lines.name: Carnage Heart
lines.flavourText:
Forged from the blood of countless wars, 
its thirst has only begun.

lines.name: Thief's Torment
lines.flavourText:
The ring I stole,
My finger they took,
A shrouded mind,
Cut their curses short,
As I drained their spirit
And stole their soul.
A blessing is often a curse.

explicitModifiers.text: Gain 25 Life per Enemy Hit with [Attack|Attacks]
Gain 15 Mana per Enemy Hit with [Attack|Attacks]

lines.name: Grip of Kulemak
lines.flavourText:
Drink deeply of the Well.
Let the Abyss coil within.

lines.name: Blackflame
lines.flavourText:
Beyond the veil of death, there burns a fire
by whose light night is borne.

explicitModifiers.text: [Ignite] you inflict deals [Chaos|Chaos Damage] instead of [Fire|Fire Damage]
[Withered] you inflict also increases [Fire] Damage taken
[Withered] does not expire on Enemies [Ignite|Ignited] by you

lines.name: Ming's Heart
lines.flavourText:
Ming slew Tranquillity
Took Chaos for his wife
And on Her immortal finger
He placed his Heart

lines.name: Death Rush
lines.flavourText: To truly appreciate life you must be there when it ends

explicitModifiers.text: You gain [Onslaught] for 4 seconds on Kill

lines.name: Vigilant View
lines.flavourText:
The warriors of the Unblinking Eye moved
together as one, shoulder to shoulder.

explicitModifiers.text: Enemies have an [Accuracy|Accuracy] Penalty against you based on Distance

lines.name: Serpent's Egg
lines.flavourText:
When Kabala the Serpent Queen was banished from Keth,
the Sekhemas took a single hostage as punishment.

explicitModifiers.text: Gain an additional [Charges|Charge] when you gain a [Charges|Charge]

lines.name: Perandus Seal
lines.flavourText: A pact with Prospero always comes at a price.

explicitModifiers.text: (10-15)% increased Quantity of Gold Dropped by Slain Enemies

lines.name: Blackheart
lines.flavourText: Fear is highly infectious.

explicitModifiers.text: 25% chance to [Intimidate] Enemies for 4 seconds on [HitDamage|Hit]

lines.name: Prized Pain
lines.flavourText: Agony brings clarity to those of pure mind.

explicitModifiers.text: Skills [StatGain|Gain] 10% of Mana Cost as [StatGain|Extra] Life Cost
(15-25)% chance to deal your [Thorns] Damage to Enemies you [HitDamage|Hit] with [Melee] [Attack|Attacks]

lines.name: Seed of Cataclysm
lines.flavourText: The dawn of a new era is set into motion

explicitModifiers.text: 5% reduced [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Spell Damage Bonus] per [Critical] [HitDamage|Hit] you've dealt with [Spell|Spells] [Recently]
(15-30)% chance for [Spell] Damage with [Critical] [HitDamage|Hits] to be [Lucky]

lines.name: Meginord's Girdle
lines.flavourText:
Kaom's strength was rivaled only by
the great Meginord of the north.

lines.name: Polcirkeln
lines.flavourText:
I rule the north
A legacy earned
Time and time again
Sing Meginord's song!

explicitModifiers.text: Enemies [Chill|Chilled] by your [HitDamage|Hits] can be [Shatter|Shattered] as though [Frozen]

lines.name: Strugglescream
lines.flavourText:
There is no light at the end of this inner strife,
but the shadows eventually become home.

lines.itemId: Call of the Brotherhood Topaz Ring
lines.name: Call of the Brotherhood
lines.flavourText:
Forged by three brothers
so that they may recognize each other
across any distance of time or travel.

lines.name: Veilpiercer
lines.flavourText:
The tribe revelled wildly, unaware that each fruit 
they ate further bound their continuity to the fog's. 
In time, the merest touch could break their reality.

explicitModifiers.text: [Curse|Curses] you inflict spread to enemies within 3 metres when [Curse|Cursed] enemy dies
Gain 1 [DarkWhispers|Dark Whisper] every second there is a [Curse|Cursed] Enemy in your [Presence]
(20-40)% increased Damage with [HitDamage|Hits] against targets in your [Presence]

lines.name: Blistering Bond
lines.flavourText:
"The Brotherhood of Silence does not set out to torture our targets.
Excruciating pain is simply a byproduct of certain... necessary methods."

explicitModifiers.text: You take [Fire] Damage instead of [Physical] Damage from [Bleeding]
[Bleeding] you inflict deals [Fire|Fire Damage] instead of [Physical|Physical Damage]

lines.name: Xoph's Blood
lines.flavourText:
We are his blood.
Through us he carries his burning message.

explicitModifiers.text: Enemies in your [Presence] have -25% to Fire Resistance

lines.name: Idol of Uldurn
lines.flavourText:
Worship of house gods was tolerated
in Oriath, so long as it remained private.

lines.name: Darkness Enthroned
lines.flavourText:
Kulemak sat triumphant, raising the crown.
Darkness coiled the world in eternal night.
Victory, a mere moment, came crashing down.
No conqueror, no conquered, only searing Light.

explicitModifiers.text: This item gains bonuses from Socketed Items as though it was Gloves
This item gains bonuses from Socketed Items as though it was a Helmet
This item gains bonuses from Socketed Items as though it was a Shield
This item gains bonuses from Socketed Items as though it was Boots

lines.name: Waistgate
lines.flavourText: Clever artifice is not always complex.

explicitModifiers.text: Life and Mana [Flask|Flasks] can be equipped in either slot

lines.name: Zerphi's Genesis
lines.flavourText: The most horrifying ideas often begin with a simple innovation.

explicitModifiers.text: 50% of Charges consumed by used [Charm|Charms] are granted to your [Flask|Life Flasks]
50% of Charges consumed by used [Flask|Life Flasks] are granted to your [Charm|Charms]
Skills from [Corrupted] Gems have (15-25)% increased Cost [Efficiency] during any [Flask] Effect
[CorruptedBlood|Corrupted Blood] cannot be inflicted on you

lines.name: Icefang Orbit
lines.flavourText:
Those members of the Brotherhood who employ the venom of 
Trarthan ice snakes must take great care with the volatile substance.

explicitModifiers.text: [DamageTypes|All Damage] taken from [HitDamage|Hits] while [Poison|Poisoned] [Contributes|Contributes] to [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of [Chill] on you

lines.name: Venopuncture
lines.flavourText:
There is a way to survive the bite of an ice snake,
but few have the resolve to attempt it.

explicitModifiers.text: [DamageTypes|All Damage] taken from [HitDamage|Hits] while [Bleeding] [Contributes|Contributes] to [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of [Chill] on you

lines.name: Surefooted Sigil
lines.flavourText: Natural grace is born, not earned.

explicitModifiers.text: 50% increased [Evasion|Evasion Rating] if you've Dodge Rolled [Recently]

lines.name: Glowswarm
lines.flavourText:
As their eyes adjusted, they became aware of a strange
blue light. Countless glowing worms crawled above,
blissfully unaware of their flight from the sirens.

explicitModifiers.text: Using a Mana [Flask] grants [Guard] equal to 100% of Flask's recovery amount for 4 seconds

lines.name: Soul Tether
lines.flavourText:
Vaal bloodpriests were among the earliest intellectuals on record.
It was they who found that a newly freed soul would
desperately cling to any other source of life.

explicitModifiers.text: You lose 5% of maximum [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] per second
Excess Life Recovery from [LifeLeech|Leech] is applied to [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]

lines.name: Ryslatha's Coil
lines.flavourText: All creatures have the potential for greatness or unequivocal failure.

lines.name: Evergrasping Ring
lines.flavourText:
Power comes to those who seek
Death comes to those who reach

explicitModifiers.text: [Allies|Allies] in your [Presence|Presence] [Gain] (15-25)% of Damage as Extra [Chaos] Damage
Enemies in your [Presence|Presence] [Gain] (6-12)% of Damage as Extra [Chaos] Damage

lines.name: Heartbound Loop
lines.flavourText:
When the axe finally fell, Seryl shared his pain,
and the last thought that flickered through his
fading mind was her broken, shattered scream.

lines.name: Goregirdle
lines.flavourText: Bleeding just means you're still alive.

lines.name: Gifts from Above
lines.flavourText: God blesses those who bless themselves.

explicitModifiers.text: (20-30)% increased [ItemRarity|Rarity of Items] Dropped by Enemies killed with a [Critical|Critical Hit]
You have [ConsecratedGround|Consecrated Ground] around you while stationary

lines.name: Cracklecreep
lines.flavourText: Fear the fire that spreads like a plague.

explicitModifiers.text: [Ignite|Ignites] you inflict [AilmentSpread|spread] to other Enemies that stay within 1.5 metres for 1 second

lines.itemId: Whisper of the Brotherhood Sapphire Ring
lines.name: Whisper of the Brotherhood
lines.flavourText:
Forged by the last remaining brother
to return all that was once given.

lines.name: Beacon of Azis
lines.flavourText:
The homeguard signalled for aid against a surprise attack,
but it was not their dekharas that responded.
It was Solerai herself.

lines.name: Fireflower
lines.flavourText:
Tale-women in training drink of a painful desert fruit.
Fire, they learn, springs from agony.

explicitModifiers.text: Take 100 [Fire] Damage when you [Ignite] an Enemy

lines.name: The Burrower
lines.flavourText:
It coils deeper and deeper
It slithers between thoughts
It lies beneath the valley
It lies in our minds

lines.name: Bijouborne
lines.flavourText: Trifle not with the trinket mage.

lines.name: The Pandemonius
lines.flavourText:
A single moment sets in motion an eternal fall,
beneath which all are buried.

lines.name: Fixation of Yix
lines.flavourText:
He knew not why he was changing, only
that he wanted to hold his family close...

explicitModifiers.text: [Allies|Allies] in your [Presence|Presence] have (30-50)% increased [Critical|Critical Hit] Chance
[Allies] in your [Presence] have (30-50)% increased [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus]
[Allies|Allies] in your [Presence|Presence] have (10-20)% increased Cast Speed

lines.name: Revered Resin
lines.flavourText: The sacred sap flows slowly, but surely.

lines.name: The Everlasting Gaze
lines.flavourText:
What they saw was what they believed, and
they believed Lunaris had not abandoned them.

explicitModifiers.text: [StatGain|Gain] (4-6)% of maximum Mana as Extra maximum [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]

lines.name: Ungil's Harmony
lines.flavourText: Gentle anger, raging calm.

lines.name: The Anvil
lines.flavourText: Forge your Perseverance on the Anvil of Faith.

lines.name: Eye of Chayula
lines.flavourText: Never blinking, always watching.

lines.name: Ligurium Talisman
lines.flavourText: Healing the soul requires sacrifice.

explicitModifiers.text: Life Regeneration is applied to [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] instead

lines.name: Stone of Lazhwar
lines.flavourText:
You are slow, foolish and ignorant.
I am not.

lines.name: Keelhaul
lines.flavourText:
Below all living things,
there exists a flow...

lines.name: Umbilicus Immortalis
lines.flavourText:
"The power of rebirth rivals that of immortality."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 3

explicitModifiers.text: Your Life [Flask] also applies to your [Minion|Minions]
[Minion|Minions] cannot Die while affected by a Life [Flask]

lines.name: Rondel of Fragility
lines.flavourText:
Fanatics are the most dangerous enemy,
for they care not for their own survival.

lines.name: Coward's Legacy
lines.flavourText:
Death is your most important duty.
Face it, or curse your bloodline for all eternity.

explicitModifiers.text: (30-40)% increased Life and Mana Recovery from [Flask|Flasks]
You are considered on [LowLife|Low Life] while at 75% of maximum Life or below instead

lines.name: Midnight Braid
lines.flavourText:
Adversity is the soil in
which persistence grows.

lines.name: Hinekora's Sight
lines.flavourText: Remember the past, anticipate the future.

lines.name: Byrnabas
lines.flavourText: The Brinerot sail without fear of storms.

lines.itemId: Cat O' Nine Tails Utility Belt
lines.name: Cat O' Nine Tails
lines.flavourText:
A Templar thinks he's righteous for flogging
himself once for every ten lashings he gives.

explicitModifiers.text: Regenerate 5% of maximum Life per second if you have been Hit [Recently]
Life Recovery other than [Flask|Flasks] cannot Recover Life to above [LowLife|Low Life]
Gain [Physical|Physical] [Thorns|Thorns] damage equal to 8% - 12% of maximum Life

lines.name: Igniferis
lines.flavourText:
A hearth unyielding, ever warm,
A light unbroken, endlessly reborn.

explicitModifiers.text: Life Recovery from Regeneration is not applied
Every 4 seconds, Recover 1 Life for every 0.2 Life Recovery per second from Regeneration

lines.name: Birthright Buckle
lines.flavourText: Some families have peculiar gifts...

explicitModifiers.text: Life [Flask|Flasks] used while on [LowLife|Low Life] apply Recovery Instantly
Mana [Flask|Flasks] used while on [LowMana|Low Mana] apply Recovery Instantly
